mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in unemployment rate above 6% indicates deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the signal, or the 3-month UNRATE trend fails to correlate with SPX returns (Pearson r < 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production and GDP growth signal a supply-side contraction, reducing corporate earnings expectations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term between INDPRO and GDPC1 fails to explain SPX returns (p > 0.1), or 20d forward returns are positive in > 50% of cases with simultaneous declines.

mechanism_narrative: A 60-day decline in housing starts below 800k signals weak demand for construction, reducing corporate revenue expectations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of triggered instances, or HOUST fails to correlate with SPX returns (Pearson r > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in CPI inflation above 2.5% prompts central bank tightening, increasing real interest rates and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or the CPIAUCSL trend fails to correlate with SPX returns (Pearson r > 0.1).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in nonfarm payrolls above 150k signals strong labor market demand, boosting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of cases with PAYEMS > 150k, or the PAYEMS trend fails to correlate with SPX returns (Pearson r < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate weak consumer demand, reducing corporate revenues and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term between RSAFS and HOUST fails to explain SPX returns (p > 0.1), or 60d forward returns are positive in > 50% of cases with simultaneous declines.

mechanism_narrative: A 20-day rise in the federal funds rate above 4% signals monetary tightening, increasing borrowing costs and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or the FEDFUNDS trend fails to correlate with SPX returns (Pearson r > 0.1).
